items.line_en: Deposit. To deposit money means to put money into your bank account. Withdraw or withdrawal.

items.line_en: To withdraw money or to make a withdrawal means to take money out of your account.

coach.hint: Chunk it: To withdraw money or / to make a withdrawal means to take money out of your account.
